title: 1Password service account tokens should not be disclosed
description: 1Password service account tokens should not be hardcoded in source code. These tokens provide access to 1Password accounts and vaults. When exposed in code repositories, they can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive password data and organizational secrets.
recommendation: Store 1Password service account tokens securely using environment variables, secure configuration management, or CI/CD secrets. Never commit them directly to source code repositories.
impact: Critical security risk - unauthorized access to 1Password organizational data and password vaults

checks.message: 1Password service account token detected in source code
